content:
Dear @everyone,

Thank you so much from the bottom of our hearts for your help!

We have compiled the translation contributions we've received so far; the translations have been updated in game as of today (December 2).
The list of Volunteers in our in-game Special Thanks page will also be updated according to this list.

Please confirm if we have logged your name (The name you want us to credit you by) and contribution content correctly! 
If there is any mistake, please let me know and we will fix it asap.

We would like to specifically thank <@183782216353054720> for helping us compile the contributors list!

**EN:**
arkaether (Lens) - Translation from CN
omnichromia (Mercy) - Proofreading, Organization
**RU:**
theriddleofcards (Riddle) - Translation
demonfox147 (Serhii Pidhorodetskyi) - Proofreading
 Elandriah - Translation & Proofreading
**ES:**
Teje - Translation
iscariote_19 (Miguel Angel) - Proofreading
**JP:**
alz_asn (Alza) - Proofreading
**KR:**
nero_aliapoh (Nero) - Translation & Proofreading
wisteriavine11 (LavenderJuly) - Translation & Proofreading
**FR:**
jun_usami (Jun) - Translation
legendaryredz (Basile) - Proofreading
**DE:**
larvani - Translation & Proofreading
strandiel (Julia) - Proofreading
**PT:**
Reaper Sakamaki - Translation
**TH:**
darkerkuro - Translation
zcaruterx (Attchan) - Proofreading
**IN:**
shiio4870 (Adelle) - Translation
**VI:**
AegisX - Translation
We are expecting to implement these newer pull requests in the December updates! Thank you so much for your contributions.
<@1376763322568937562> hello Ace! Could you please add <@331131095896686595> to RU contributors as "Proofreading & Translation"?
